hero.description: Optimized infrastructure, advanced security, and real human support so your website loads fast, stays stable, and is ready to scale without limits.

nextLevel.title: Take your app to the next level with Veltrion
nextLevel.description: At Veltrion, we optimize and improve your applications' performance to make them more functional, secure, and efficient. We combine technology, strategy, and experience to keep your project updated and performing at its best digitally.

0.title: Strategic approach
0.body: Every project is unique. We analyze, design, and develop tailored solutions to create stable, fast, and scalable apps. With us, your application evolves with purpose.

1.title: Transparent communication
1.body: We work with you through every stage of the process, maintaining clear and constant communication so you always stay in control of your project's progress.

2.title: Cutting-edge technology
2.body: We use the most modern tools to guarantee performance, compatibility, and security in every application we develop or improve.

boostPresence.description: At Veltrion, we drive your digital growth with tailored solutions. We develop, optimize, and improve apps that connect with your users and strengthen your brand. Our goal: making your technology work as well as your ideas.

solutions.description: At Veltrion, we help companies and entrepreneurs create, improve, and maintain functional, secure, and high-performance applications. Every service is designed to strengthen your digital presence and optimize your users' experience.
solutions.tagline: Technology that adds value: we create, fix, and optimize your applications so they can grow with you.

customDevelopment.title: Custom development
customDevelopment.description: Unique applications built around your needs.

maintenance.title: Maintenance and fixes
maintenance.description: We fix bugs and improve performance.

optimization.title: Continuous optimization
optimization.description: We constantly update and improve your app.

plans.description: Choose the option that best fits your project. At Veltrion, we offer flexible solutions to develop, optimize, or maintain your apps with guaranteed results.

faqSection.description: We answer the most common questions about our development and support services.

card.title: Still have questions?
card.description: If you couldn't find the answer you were looking for, our team will be happy to help you.

ctaSection.description: We're ready to help you create, improve, or repair your applications with smart and personalized solutions.
ctaSection.bottomText: Take your project to the next level with

footer.description: We create, improve, and optimize your apps so they can perform without limits.

metadata.title: Let's Talk – Veltrion | Tell us about your project
metadata.description: Tell us what you need and our team will get back to you as soon as possible. Let's build your next application together.

hero.description: Tell us what you need and we'll help you build a modern, scalable solution focused on real results.

contactSection.title: We're ready to help you
contactSection.description: Choose your preferred contact method and our team will respond as soon as possible.

phone.title: Call us
phone.description: Personalized support for questions and projects.

email.title: Email
email.description: Write to us and we'll reply as soon as possible.

location.title: Location
location.description: We work with clients across Mexico and Latin America.

success.title: Message sent!
success.description: Thank you for contacting us. Our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

terms.suffix: for the use of my submitted data.

metadata.title: Development – Veltrion | App development, optimization, and maintenance
metadata.description: Choose the ideal plan to develop, optimize, or maintain your application with modern, scalable solutions focused on results.

plans.description: Plans designed for companies, startups, and projects that need speed, stability, and a modern experience.

specialized.description1: All our services are based on previously contracted hours. Once the agreed time is completed, any additional work required to finish the project will be considered outside the original scope.
specialized.description2: These adjustments will be billed separately at the previously agreed hourly rate, and explicit client authorization will be required before proceeding with any additional work.

devHero.title: Development that
devHero.description: At Veltrion, we design digital solutions focused on performance, scalability, and user experience so your application can grow without limits.
devHero.bottomNote: We create, optimize, and maintain modern applications with solid architecture, fluid interfaces, and specialized support for companies that truly want to grow.
